name: Fried Green Beans with Coconut
recipeIngredient: 1 T Fresh Ginger Root, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a 10-inch heavy skillet or 12-inch wok over moderate heat until a drop of cold water sizzles immediately.
2. Add the mustard seeds and fry for 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the onions, ginger, salt, and pepper, then add the green beans.
4. Continue stirring to incorporate all ingredients, adding red pepper and frying for 5 more minutes.
5. Mix in coconut and coriander, lower heat to low, cover pan, and stir occasionally until beans are tender, about 10 more minutes.
6. Drizzle with lemon juice, adjust seasoning if needed, and serve immediately.
